ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How to use Neo4j?'})-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'Neo4j'}),
    p2 = (u:User {uuid: 123})-[:ASKED]->(q)-[:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {is_accepted: true}),
    p3 = (a)-[:PROVIDED]->(u)-[:COMMENTED]->(c:Comment {score: 5})-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(q)
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How have the top-scoring answers to the "How to use Neo4j?" question evolved over time, and which user’s contributions have consistently received the highest engagement, as reflected in their comment scores?

cypher:
MATCH (q:Question {title: "How to use Neo4j?"})<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer)<-[:PROVIDED]-(u:User)
WITH q, a, u, COUNT(a) AS answer_count, SUM(a.score) AS total_score, SUM(a.score) / COUNT(a) AS avg_score, COUNT(DISTINCT u) AS user_count
ORDER BY avg_score DESC
RETURN q.title AS question_title, q.link AS question_link, a.title AS answer_title, a.link AS answer_link, u.display_name AS user_name, avg_score, user_count
LIMIT 1
